title: aira montana var. setacea
intro: Aira montana var. setacea, also known as Hair Grass, is a type of grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues and coughs. The health benefits of Aira montana var. setacea include its expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and soothe the respiratory tract. The plant can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used as a tincture to make it easier to consume the medicinal properties.
